constraints.layout_style: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value

reference_templates.notes: Fields structured as dl/dt/dd definition list pairs

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Reference DOM (Definition list form): Fields structured as dl/dt/dd definition list pairs Reference DOM (Form inside dialog): Application fields live inside a native dialog element Reference DOM (Aria describedby hints): Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: aria-label-only, split-phone, div-role-textbox, iframe-apply, readonly-prefill. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Definition list form; Form inside dialog; Aria describedby hints.
